themes.name: Avios
themes.description: FL350 — smarter Avios, better journeys. Bright editorial layout with hero, deal ticker, calculator, redemptions, credit-card offers and travel articles. Extends Midnight Pulse for content fallbacks.
themes.author: Avios Studio

themes.name: Midnight Pulse
themes.description: Dark SaaS-style layout with gradient accents, header, footer, and content-focused typography. Uses global settings and menus.
themes.author: Studio CMS

plugins.name: Analytics snippet
plugins.description: Admin reference for pasting analytics or tag-manager snippets into your theme layout (head_extra / scripts_extra).
plugins.author: Studio CMS

plugins.name: Avios Destination Review
plugins.description: Generate SEO-friendly destination reviews via OpenAI for each British Airways destination on file in the How Many Avios · Fare table. Editable rich-text reviews stored in self-contained adr_* tables.
plugins.author: Avios Studio

plugins.name: Content Stream
plugins.description: Admin OpenAI API settings and a public page to enter a domain and preview a short AI-generated content stream brief.
plugins.author: Struxa

plugins.name: Forum
plugins.description: MyBB-inspired community forum for Struxa CMS. Categories → forums → threads → posts, with sticky/locked threads, post likes, thread subscriptions, user ranks, quote replies, Markdown rendering, online-now tracking, and a full admin moderation panel. Threads are also exposed as a 'Forum thread' CMS content type so they inherit SEO metadata, slugs and featured images.
plugins.author: Studio CMS

plugins.name: Forum spin import
plugins.description: Stage scraped forum TSV exports, then replay threads into a target forum with OpenAI paraphrasing (same meaning and tone, not a verbatim copy), synthetic users, and back-dated timestamps. Chunked admin AJAX with pause/stop/resume. Requires the Forum plugin and an OpenAI key under System → API keys.
plugins.author: Avios Studio

plugins.name: Guides
plugins.description: Imports AI-rewritten travel guides from a TSV export into the 'Guides' CMS content type. One entry per source article, with the article HTML stored as a richtext body and SEO fields seeded from the export. Idempotent — re-running the importer only adds rows it hasn't seen before (matched on legacy_id).
plugins.author: Avios Studio

plugins.name: Hello Plugin
plugins.description: Sample Stage 8 plugin: admin page, public route, optional DB table via migration, and event subscription.
plugins.author: Studio CMS

plugins.name: Mailing list
plugins.description: Create mailing lists in the admin, validate subscriber emails, and collect sign-ups on the storefront.
plugins.author: Struxa

plugins.name: SEO helper
plugins.description: Admin checklist for meta titles, descriptions, and sensible defaults — complements theme SEO blocks.
plugins.author: Studio CMS

plugins.name: Stripe store
plugins.description: Stripe Checkout for purchasable content entries (e.g. products). No core code changes — enable the plugin, run its SQL migration, add a Stripe Price field, and include one script tag on product pages. After install: run composer plugin-deps at the CMS root (Stripe PHP SDK).
plugins.author: Studio CMS
